rationale: P7-01 BLOCK — baseline rotated as part of /code-review --fix sweep: (1) restore socket close listener off() on success path (CR-02 leak fix); (2) thread AbortSignal + encoding_format into provider.embed call (SC3 propagation + EMB-H06 honor); (3) drop route-side base64 bypass emission (now owned by provider — eliminates double-count); (4) widen catch-side breaker.recordFailure filter to skip provider-internal errors (RegistryUnknownModelError / CapabilityNotSupportedError / EmbeddingsDimsMismatchError). Wire response model now preserves upstream id (regression fix). All vitest regression on router/tests/routes/embeddings.test.ts passes.
